title: Marsdenia dracontea

The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Marsdenia dracontea include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Marsdenia dracontea include extracts, infusions, and decoctions, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
